debug_info.goal:
case inr
ι : Type u_1
Ω : Type u_2
inst✝⁶ : Fintype ι
mΩ : MeasurableSpace Ω
P : Measure Ω
E : ι → Type u_3
inst✝⁵ : (i : ι) → NormedAddCommGroup (E i)
inst✝⁴ : (i : ι) → NormedSpace ℝ (E i)
inst✝³ : (i : ι) → MeasurableSpace (E i)
inst✝² : ∀ (i : ι), CompleteSpace (E i)
inst✝¹ : ∀ (i : ι), BorelSpace (E i)
inst✝ : ∀ (i : ι), SecondCountableTopology (E i)
X : (i : ι) → Ω → E i
h : ∀ (i : ι), HasGaussianLaw (X i) P
hX : iIndepFun X P
this : IsProbabilityMeasure P
hι : Nonempty ι
⊢ ∃ m f,
    f.toBilinForm.IsPosSemidef ∧
      ∀ (L : StrongDual ℝ ((x : ι) → E x)),
        charFunDual (Measure.map (fun ω x => X x ω) P) L = exp (↑(L m) * I - ↑((f L) L) / 2)

      have : ∀ i, charFun (P.map (fun ω ↦ L (Pi.single i (X i ω)))) 1 =

rcases fun i => (h i).isGaussian_map with ⟨m, f, hf, hchar⟩
    refine ⟨fun i => m, fun L => ∑ i, f (L.comp (ContinuousLinearMap.single i)), ?_, ?_⟩
    ·
      intro L
      -- positivity is inherited from each coordinate
      classical
      simpa using (by
        intro x
        have : 0 ≤ ∑ i, (f (L.comp (ContinuousLinearMap.single i))) (L.comp (ContinuousLinearMap.single i)) := by
          exact Finset.sum_nonneg (fun i _ => hf (L.comp (ContinuousLinearMap.single i)))
        simpa)
    ·
      intro L
      classical
      -- characteristic function of product of independent Gaussians
      have hInd :
          iIndepFun (fun i ω => (L.comp (ContinuousLinearMap.single i)) (X i ω)) P := by
        simpa [iIndepFun] using (hX.comp (fun i => L.comp (ContinuousLinearMap.single i)))
      have hGauss :
          ∀ i, HasGaussianLaw (fun ω => (L.comp (ContinuousLinearMap.single i)) (X i ω)) P := by
        intro i
        simpa using (h i).comp (L.comp (ContinuousLinearMap.single i))
      -- use the standard characterization via charFunDual for sums of independent Gaussians
      have := (isGaussian_iff_gaussian_charFunDual.mp (by
        -- one-dimensional Gaussian
        simpa using (hGauss (Classical.choice hι)).isGaussian_map)).2
      -- fallback to existing lemma in Mathlib: map to linear functional preserves gaussianity
      simpa using (IsGaussian.charFunDual_eq (μ := Measure.map (fun ω x => X x ω) P) L)

      have hmem : ∀ i, MemLp (X i) 2 P := fun i ↦ (h i).memLp_two
      have haemeas : AEMeasurable (fun ω ↦ (X · ω)) P := by
        fun_prop
      have hint : Integrable (fun ω ↦ (L (fun x ↦ X x ω))) P := by
        have : MemLp (fun ω ↦ (L (fun x ↦ X x ω))) 1 P := by

            simpa [PiLp.memLp_iff] using hmem))
        exact this.integrable
      have hchar :

                (L.comp (ContinuousLinearMap.single j))) ) / 2) := by
        classical

          have hind : iIndepFun X P := hX
          exact IsGaussian.pi_map_of_iIndepFun this hind
        simpa using hprod.charFunDual_eq_exp L
      simpa using hchar
    ·
      classical
      constructor
      · intro L
        classical
        have : 0 ≤ ∑ i, ∑ j,
            (h i).cov (L.comp (ContinuousLinearMap.single i)) (L.comp (ContinuousLinearMap.single j)) := by
          classical

        simpa [PiLp, covarianceBilin_apply_pi, Finset.sum_mul] using this

        classical

        intro i

      have : HasGaussianLaw (fun ω ↦ (fun i ↦ L (ContinuousLinearMap.single i (X i ω)))) P :=
        iIndepFun.hasGaussianLaw (ι := ι) (Ω := Ω) (P := P) (E := fun _ ↦ ℝ) (X := fun i ω ↦ L (ContinuousLinearMap.single i (X i ω))) hgauss hind
